name: Sparsholt
overview: Sparsholt is a village in beautiful countryside just west of Winchester in Hampshire, regarded as one of the county's finest villages. It is a thriving community with a pub, shop/Post Office, parish church and primary school, and is home to the renowned Lainston House country-house hotel. The village gives its name to Sparsholt College, a long-established land-based further and higher education college on its edge.
character: A picturesque, affluent downland village west of Winchester, prized for its rural setting, country-house hotel and strong sense of community.
amenities: Surrounded by walking and cycling country

commutes.notes: Via Winchester station with fast services

prices.summary: A premium Winchester-area village; characterful period and detached homes in sought-after countryside command high values. See Rightmove for current sold-price detail.

thingsToDo: Walks and cycling in the downland west of Winchester
Dining and stays at Lainston House Hotel
Chalk-stream fishing on the nearby Test and Itchen
Easy access to Winchester's heritage and shops
pros: One of Hampshire's finest villages with full amenities
Renowned Sparsholt College on the doorstep
Close to Winchester and fast London rail
Excellent surrounding countryside and country-house hotel
cons: No railway station in the village (rely on Winchester)
Secondary schooling (academic) is in Winchester, not the village
whoItSuits: Buyers wanting a prestigious, well-served village close to Winchester with countryside on the doorstep.
